name: Holo Boot Prompt
summary: A single concise prompt that boots any LLM into the Hologram verified substrate — a pinned Constitution root, strict integrity enforcement, and a sealed receipt that proves itself genuine on every response. The prompt is itself a sealed, verified object.

description.p: Paste one block into any LLM and it roots itself in the Hologram κ-addressable substrate: it boots from a single self-verifying link (INDEX/#CID), re-derives the pinned Constitution κ before trusting anything, and adopts the holospaces Laws L1-L5 as binding for the whole session.

Robust by construction. The Constitution root is pinned INLINE (did:holo:sha256:3ff288d0...f00c) so an LLM with no network can still detect a swapped root and fail closed. The pin is the live root the OS conscience itself verifies (holo-conscience.js PINNED.root).

Every response the LLM emits carries a sealed receipt — the κ of the exact bytes between markers — that anyone can re-derive with one sha256 call, no server and no third party. Fabricating a digest is forbidden: a κ that does not re-derive is a Law-L5 violation and is refused.

ul: Sealed, server-free receipt on every response
Self-referential boot: the CID is this holospace's own root κ
The prompt is itself a κ-object with a live Law-L5 badge

releases.description: The boot prompt, sealed as a holospace: a single pasteable block that roots any LLM in the κ-substrate. Pins the Constitution root inline for offline swap-detection, enforces holospaces L1-L5 fail-closed, and requires a sealed self-verifying receipt on every response. Ships with a live in-tab Law-L5 badge that re-derives the prompt to its own sealed κ.
